about.title: About Me
about.metaDescription: Meet Thiago Novato: Software Engineer with 20+ years of experience, from government internships to data engineering for the wine industry.
about.intro: My name is <bold>Thiago Novato</bold>, and for over 20 years I've been building software. I started in 2005 as an intern developing systems in PHP and MySQL. From there, I went through industrial automation, technical leadership, and now work in data engineering for the wine industry.
about.journeyText: My journey went through diverse contexts: government internships, industrial automation programming PLCs and Ladder, teaching at technical institutes, and then diving into full-stack web development. I worked as Tech Lead coordinating teams and architecture, and built systems that processed over <bold>1 million test results</bold>. In parallel, I created <bold>Logus Academy</bold>, a transcription platform with 700+ users and 10,000+ hours transcribed.
about.todayText: Currently, I work as a Software Engineer building data pipelines with Python, Airflow, dbt, and BigQuery for the wine industry. I integrate e-commerce platforms and develop dashboards in React. Previously, I worked on API integrations and advanced technical support for email marketing platforms.
about.whyText1: After two decades of experiences, mistakes, and learnings, I decided it was time to share. Not shallow tutorials or generic lists — but real reflections on building software for 20 years, navigating an international career, and staying in continuous learning mode.
about.whyText2: If you're a developer, software engineer, or someone who uses technology to build things that matter — this space is for you.

2005.title: First Steps
2005.description: Started as intern developing systems in PHP and MySQL for government institutions.

2010.title: Industrial Automation
2010.description: System Analyst programming PLCs and control systems for industrial companies.

2016.title: Full-Stack Web
2016.description: Transitioned to modern web development with React, Node.js, and Firebase.

2019.title: 1 Million Results
2019.description: Built systems that processed over 1 million test results with Kafka and NestJS.

2021.title: Technical Leadership
2021.description: Tech Lead coordinating teams and architecture for multiple projects.

2023.title: International Market
2023.description: Started working with international teams focused on integrations and data engineering.

2026.title: Tech Writing
2026.description: Consolidating this blog to share 20 years of learnings in software engineering.
